name: New LeetCode Problem
about: Suggest a new LeetCode problem to be added to the repository.

labels: leetcode

---

**Problem Name**
Please provide the exact name of the LeetCode problem.

**Problem Link**
Please provide the URL to the LeetCode problem.

**Problem Category**
(e.g., Array, String, Dynamic Programming, etc.)

**Proposed Solution Details**
Briefly describe what you intend to add (e.g., "Optimal O(n) solution in Python").

**Additional context**
Any other details that might be helpful.
